title: The Rats Woke Up
writer: Dragoljub Ivkov, Ljubisa Kozomara, Gordan Mihic
actors: Slobodan 'Cica' Perovic, Dusica Zegarac, Severin Bijelic
plot: A lonely man struggles to find the money for his ill sister's treatment while at the same time trying to escape his past and to make sense of the present.
